allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totalReports:', d.get\('totalReports'\), '| rows:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\)\); [print\(' -', r.get\('machine_name'\), 'part', r.get\('part_number'\)\) for r in d.get\('data',[]\)[:8]]")

PowerShell($p = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Host "node running, PID\(s\): $\($p.Id -join ', '\)" } else { Write-Host "NO node process running" }; netstat -ano | Select-String ":6006" | Select-String "LISTENING")

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { Write-Host "node processes running: $\($procs.Count\)"; $procs | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Host "no node processes" })

PowerShell($listen = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6006 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($listen\) { $listen | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Port 6006 LISTENING: PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\), started $\($p.StartTime\)" } } else { Write-Host "Nothing LISTENING on 6006" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6006 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "port freed")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6006 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $l = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6006 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($l\) { Write-Host "still running" } else { Write-Host "PORT 6006 FREE" })
